title: coelogyne squamosa
intro: Coelogyne squamosa, also known as the scaly orchid, is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia and China. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coelogyne squamosa include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into a tea or powder, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
